products.name: Glycerine
products.physicalForm: Clear, colourless, viscous liquid with high purity and mild sweetness; hygroscopic
products.cardDescription: A versatile industrial chemical used in soap and personal care manufacturing, pharmaceutical production, alkyd resins, and food processing as a humectant.

applications.detail: By-product of saponification; used as a moisturiser and emollient in soaps, creams, and cosmetics.
Excipient and solvent in syrups, suppositories, and topical formulations.
Humectant, sweetener, and thickening agent; approved food additive (E422).
Key raw material in alkyd resin synthesis for paints and surface coatings.
Softening and conditioning agent for fibres and fabrics.
